diagnostics.title: Unversioned localStorage key
diagnostics.message: localStorage.setItem("letterboxd_recent_profiles", JSON.stringify(...)) has no version, so changing the data shape later crashes your users' saved sessions. Add one to the key (e.g. "letterboxd_recent_profiles:v1").
diagnostics.help: Put a version in the storage key (e.g. "myKey:v1"). If you change the data shape later, old saved data can be ignored instead of crashing the app.

diagnostics.title: Large inline style object rebuilds every render
diagnostics.message: This inline style has 8 properties, which is hard to read & rebuilds every render. Move it to a CSS class, CSS module, or styled component.
diagnostics.help: Move the styles to a CSS class, CSS module, Tailwind utilities, or a styled component. Big inline objects are hard to read and rebuild on every update.

diagnostics.title: Text is too small
diagnostics.message: Your users strain to read 9.6px text, so use at least 12px for body text, & 16px is best.
diagnostics.help: Use at least 12px for body text, and 16px is best. Small text is hard to read, especially on phones.

diagnostics.title: Button missing explicit type
diagnostics.message: Your users can submit the form by accident because a `<button>` with no `type` defaults to submit.
diagnostics.help: Set an explicit button `type` so plain buttons do not submit forms by accident: `type="button"`, `"submit"`, or `"reset"`.

diagnostics.message: This can stutter because transition: "all" animates every property, even slow layout ones, so list only the properties you actually change
diagnostics.help: List the specific properties: `transition: "opacity 200ms, transform 200ms"`. In Tailwind, use `transition-colors`, `transition-opacity`, or `transition-transform`

diagnostics.title: Static value rebuilt every render
diagnostics.message: `btnBase` inside `AppHeader` uses no local state but is rebuilt every render, so it looks new each time & breaks memoized children. Move it to the top of the file, outside the component.
diagnostics.help: Move the value above the component, at the top of the file. It doesn't use local state, so rebuilding it each update is wasted and makes it look new every time.

diagnostics.title: Click handler missing keyboard handler
diagnostics.message: Keyboard users can't trigger this click handler because there's no keyboard one, so add `onKeyUp`, `onKeyDown`, or `onKeyPress`.
diagnostics.help: Pair `onClick` with a key handler so keyboard users can trigger it.

diagnostics.title: Handler on non-interactive element
diagnostics.message: Keyboard & screen reader users can't trigger this `<h1>` because it isn't interactive, so use a button or link or add an interactive role.

diagnostics.title: Animating layout properties
diagnostics.message: Your users see janky, stuttering animation because "padding-bottom" relayouts the page every frame, so animate transform & opacity instead.
diagnostics.help: Animate `transform` and `opacity` instead, since they're cheap for the browser. For height, animate `grid-template-rows` from `0fr` to `1fr`.

diagnostics.title: Transition duration too long
diagnostics.message: Your users wait through a sluggish 1500ms transition, so keep UI transitions under 1000ms & save longer ones for big page-load animations.
diagnostics.help: Keep UI transitions under 1s. Use about 100 to 150ms for instant feedback, 200 to 300ms for state changes, and 300 to 500ms for layout. Save longer ones for big page-load animations.

diagnostics.title: Spread copy before sort()
diagnostics.message: This wastes work because [...array].sort() copies the array just to sort it, so use array.toSorted() to sort without the extra copy (ES2023)
diagnostics.help: Use `array.toSorted()` (ES2023) instead of `[...array].sort()` so you sort without copying the array first

diagnostics.title: Array lookup inside a loop
diagnostics.message: This scales poorly because `array.includes()` inside a loop scans the whole list every time. Use a Set for constant-time lookups.
diagnostics.help: Use a `Set` or `Map` when you check for the same items over and over. `Array.includes`/`find` scans the whole list each time

diagnostics.help: List the specific properties: `transition: "opacity 200ms, transform 200ms"`. In Tailwind, use `transition-colors`, `transition-opacity`, or `transition-transform`

diagnostics.title: Large inline style object rebuilds every render
diagnostics.message: This inline style has 10 properties, which is hard to read & rebuilds every render. Move it to a CSS class, CSS module, or styled component.
diagnostics.help: Move the styles to a CSS class, CSS module, Tailwind utilities, or a styled component. Big inline objects are hard to read and rebuild on every update.

diagnostics.title: Button missing explicit type
diagnostics.message: Your users can submit the form by accident because a `<button>` with no `type` defaults to submit.
diagnostics.help: Set an explicit button `type` so plain buttons do not submit forms by accident: `type="button"`, `"submit"`, or `"reset"`.

diagnostics.title: Unversioned localStorage key
diagnostics.message: localStorage.setItem("letterboxd_recent_profiles", JSON.stringify(...)) has no version, so changing the data shape later crashes your users' saved sessions. Add one to the key (e.g. "letterboxd_recent_profiles:v1").
diagnostics.help: Put a version in the storage key (e.g. "myKey:v1"). If you change the data shape later, old saved data can be ignored instead of crashing the app.

diagnostics.title: Static value rebuilt every render
diagnostics.message: `btnBase` inside `AppHeader` uses no local state but is rebuilt every render, so it looks new each time & breaks memoized children. Move it to the top of the file, outside the component.
diagnostics.help: Move the value above the component, at the top of the file. It doesn't use local state, so rebuilding it each update is wasted and makes it look new every time.

diagnostics.title: Animating layout properties
diagnostics.message: Your users see janky, stuttering animation because "padding-bottom" relayouts the page every frame, so animate transform & opacity instead.
diagnostics.help: Animate `transform` and `opacity` instead, since they're cheap for the browser. For height, animate `grid-template-rows` from `0fr` to `1fr`.

diagnostics.title: Transition duration too long
diagnostics.message: Your users wait through a sluggish 1500ms transition, so keep UI transitions under 1000ms & save longer ones for big page-load animations.
diagnostics.help: Keep UI transitions under 1s. Use about 100 to 150ms for instant feedback, 200 to 300ms for state changes, and 300 to 500ms for layout. Save longer ones for big page-load animations.

diagnostics.title: Spread copy before sort()
diagnostics.message: This wastes work because [...array].sort() copies the array just to sort it, so use array.toSorted() to sort without the extra copy (ES2023)
diagnostics.help: Use `array.toSorted()` (ES2023) instead of `[...array].sort()` so you sort without copying the array first

diagnostics.title: Array lookup inside a loop
diagnostics.message: This scales poorly because `array.includes()` inside a loop scans the whole list every time. Use a Set for constant-time lookups.
diagnostics.help: Use a `Set` or `Map` when you check for the same items over and over. `Array.includes`/`find` scans the whole list each time

diagnostics.message: Your users strain to read 11.2px text, so use at least 12px for body text, & 16px is best.
diagnostics.help: Use at least 12px for body text, and 16px is best. Small text is hard to read, especially on phones.

diagnostics.title: Button missing explicit type
diagnostics.message: Your users can submit the form by accident because a `<button>` with no `type` defaults to submit.
diagnostics.help: Set an explicit button `type` so plain buttons do not submit forms by accident: `type="button"`, `"submit"`, or `"reset"`.

diagnostics.title: Array index used as a key
diagnostics.message: Your users can see & submit the wrong data when this list reorders or filters, so use a stable id like `key={item.id}`, not the array index "i".
diagnostics.help: Use a stable id from the item, like `key={item.id}` or `key={item.slug}`. Index keys break when the list reorders or filters.

diagnostics.title: transition: all animates everything
diagnostics.message: This can stutter because transition: "all" animates every property, even slow layout ones, so list only the properties you actually change
diagnostics.help: List the specific properties: `transition: "opacity 200ms, transform 200ms"`. In Tailwind, use `transition-colors`, `transition-opacity`, or `transition-transform`

diagnostics.title: Button missing explicit type
diagnostics.message: Your users can submit the form by accident because a `<button>` with no `type` defaults to submit.
diagnostics.help: Set an explicit button `type` so plain buttons do not submit forms by accident: `type="button"`, `"submit"`, or `"reset"`.

diagnostics.title: Large inline style object rebuilds every render
diagnostics.message: This inline style has 9 properties, which is hard to read & rebuilds every render. Move it to a CSS class, CSS module, or styled component.
diagnostics.help: Move the styles to a CSS class, CSS module, Tailwind utilities, or a styled component. Big inline objects are hard to read and rebuild on every update.
